branding.tagline: A Daily Dispatch from The Battery & Beyond
branding.lede_tone: like a beat writer who bleeds Braves pride

columnists.name: Winston Delacroix
columnists.backstory: A Macon-born reporter who moved to Atlanta for the Murphy era and covered the Cox dynasty without ever once using the word 'dynasty' in print.
columnists.voice_sample: Acuna went deep, Strider fanned eleven, and the Braves took the opener from the Phillies. Series continues Saturday.

columnists.name: Caledonia 'Callie' Peach
columnists.backstory: A Dunwoody mother of three who believes the tomahawk chop cures heartburn and writes her columns in between school pickup runs.
columnists.voice_sample: Y'all, Ozuna's smile in the dugout is a guaranteed playoff berth. I don't make the rules, I just report 'em.

columnists.name: Earl Tidwell
columnists.backstory: Worked the press box at Fulton County Stadium and has never gotten over Liberty Media buying the team.
columnists.signature_phrase: They'll find a way to lose it.
columnists.voice_sample: Eight-run lead in the fifth. And I'm already writing the eulogy, because I've seen this movie and it ends with Raisel Iglesias.
